name: full_workflow_orientation
prompt: How do I use this repo from sources.txt to a final report?
checks: explains the canonical sequence from sources.txt to reports
recommends the relevant operational skills in order
stays instructional instead of performing the workflow

name: stage_routing_from_sources
prompt: I have sources.txt and want transcripts next. Which skill should I use?
checks: identifies source intake as the current stage
mentions likely outputs such as transcripts and inventory

name: stage_routing_from_digests
prompt: I already have files in artifacts/digests. What should I use now?
checks: identifies digest-to-report as the current stage when the user wants prose
mentions artifacts-to-json-distiller only when a digest is still missing or weak
keeps the answer concise and action-oriented

name: new_user_entrypoint
prompt: I'm new here. Which skill should I start with?
checks: uses sources.txt as the default starting point
points new users to workflow-guide-assistant for orientation and source-intake-orchestrator for execution
mentions common setup blockers such as yt-dlp only if relevant
does not overwhelm the user with every detail at once
